message:
Add zstd decompression support and fix Float32Array alignment

- Add zstd decompression functions to WASM (using Zig std.compress.zstd)
- Export zstd_decompress() and zstd_get_decompressed_size() for JS
- Fix Float32Array alignment issue in vector search that caused NaN scores
- WASM binary grows from 115KB to 171KB (+56KB for zstd support)

Note: Zstd compression tested but not enabled for dataset - only 13%
savings on float32 embeddings, not worth the complexity of full
fragment download vs streaming Range requests.
